name: /wtft
tagline: Where The F***ing Tokens?! (WTFT) - Cost Auditing Widget
description: Displays a horizontal, stacked TUI bar chart widget of your session's token costs classified into Spec, Code, and Other work types.

usage.desc: Group cost data into 1-minute, 1-hour, 1-day, or 1-week bins (default: 1h).
Limit the number of interval bars displayed (default: 10).
Set the maximum character width of the TUI widget (default: 80).
Render bars as cumulative sums over time (each bar is sum of current and all prior intervals).
Render bars as discrete interval cost buckets (default behavior).
Display proportional cost scale tick marks above the bars (default behavior).
Disable cost scale tick marks above the bars.
Show or refresh the WTFT cost-auditing widget (default behavior).

examples.desc: Analyze session cost breakdown in a widget below the editor (80 chars wide).
Show cumulative token cost growth over time binned by hour.
Show last 20 1-minute interval bars with scale ticks hidden.
Force show or refresh the cost audit widget.
Hide the cost audit widget from the display.
